name: Memory Load
description: Before any task execution, load brand bible, canon data, and current spec context for continuity.

then.prompt: Before executing this task, read these files for context: .kiro/steering/ceo-brand-bible.md, .kiro/steering/mystermyself-automation.md, data/tcu-character-canon.ts.
